clinical_criteria: At least one occurrence of female breast cancer diagnostic codes (Table 1) OR at least two occurrences (from distinct calendar days) of breast cancer history codes (Table 2) if no diagnostic codes present
For controls: None of the female breast cancer diagnostic codes (Table 1) or breast cancer history codes (Table 2)
algorithm_summary: This is a breast cancer phenotype algorithm modified from the eMERGE program definition. Cases are defined as females aged 18+ with either: (1) at least one female breast cancer diagnostic code from Table 1, or (2) at least two breast cancer history codes from Table 2 on distinct calendar days if no diagnostic codes are present. Controls are females aged 18+ (or minimum age of identified cases if case distribution skews older) with no breast cancer diagnostic or history codes. The algorithm is restricted to cisgender females only and does not consider cancer subtypes. Age at sample draw for genotyping is the preferred age variable for analysis adjustment.
